description: PoliceRequestDestination holds the destination information for a PoliceRequest. When app and component are set, the request is evaluated against the app component's policies instead of a provider. In that case, the provider field on the PoliceRequest must not be set.

app.description: The name of the destination application.
app.title: app

component.description: The component of the destination application.
component.title: component

host.description: The host name of the destination. Optional, for logging enrichment.
host.title: host

ip.description: The destination IP address. Optional, for logging enrichment.
ip.title: ip

workloadGroupHash.description: The hash of the workload group this application belongs to.
workloadGroupHash.title: workloadGroupHash

workloadGroupLabel.description: The label format of the workload group this application belongs to.
workloadGroupLabel.title: workloadGroupLabel

workloadGroupSetHash.description: The hash of the workload group set this application belongs to.
workloadGroupSetHash.title: workloadGroupSetHash

workloadGroupSetLabel.description: The label format of the workload group set this application belongs to.
workloadGroupSetLabel.title: workloadGroupSetLabel

title: PoliceRequestDestination
